cards.title: Kindness Is Never Wasted
cards.caption: A ginger cat and a reminder for Roast Dinner Day: the good you give finds its way back, often greater than you imagined. Surfaced by Threadverse. What kindness came back to you?
cards.quote: Never regret having a kind heart. Kindness is never wasted.

cards.title: One Word: Kindness
cards.caption: An appeal that stuck with us: be kind to fellow humans, kinder still to the animals who are more vulnerable. One of the good ones our feed kept. Agree?
cards.quote: Be kinder to our animal friends, because they are more vulnerable contextually.

cards.title: The Smallest Act Beats The Grandest Intention
cards.caption: Pink blooms and a line worth screenshotting: the smallest act of kindness outweighs the grandest intention. A quiet Monday find from our feed.
cards.quote: The smallest act of kindness is worth more than the grandest intention.

cards.title: For The People Who See The Gold In Others
cards.caption: A shoutout to the ones who bring out the best in everyone around them. The world is better because you're here. Tag someone who does this for you.
cards.quote: Shoutout to people who see the gold in others.

cards.title: Kindness Is Everything
cards.caption: Be kind to animals. A tiny wholesome clip our feed surfaced.

cards.title: When The Day Awakens
cards.caption: A misty forest and a blessing for the day ahead. Quiet, a little sprawling, kept by our feed.

cards.title: Together We Empower, Inspire, Connect
cards.caption: When women share their stories and lift each other up, amazing things happen. Every act of kindness strengthens the whole community. Who lifted you up?
cards.quote: Every act of kindness, every word of encouragement, strengthens our community.

cards.title: Choose Kindness
cards.caption: Help others today. Choose kindness. Short and sweet, from our feed.
cards.quote: help others today. choose kindness<3

cards.title: Your Inner Library Holds Every Story
cards.caption: A birthday post that gives YOU the gift: the French word for the invisible shelf inside you, filled with every book, heartbreak, and quote that shaped you. What's on your shelf? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: means your 'inner library' the invisible shelf you carry inside

cards.title: Treat Your Emotional Energy Like A Budget
cards.caption: Be generous, but invest where it grows. Spend it all on people who don't pour back and you end up bankrupt. Best reframe I've read this week. Curated by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Treat your emotional energy like a budget.

cards.title: A Short True Story About Kindness
cards.caption: Just a bare link to an off-site 'inspirational story' with no actual content shown. Nothing to feel yet.

cards.title: A Dog Named Henry Wrote You This
cards.caption: Dear BlueSky: there is goodness. There is kindness. There are people who care. Don't give up looking for it. Signed, Henry the Yorkie. Threadverse found this one.
cards.quote: There is hope. Don't give up looking for it.

cards.title: Earth Angel Exists
cards.caption: A sweet one-liner over a video that won't play in the card, low context and mostly emojis. Not enough to carry a repost.

cards.title: A Random Act That Made Her Day
cards.caption: Random acts of kindness are always encouraged, and this one absolutely made her day. Real proof it costs nothing. Who made YOUR day recently? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Random acts of kindness are always encouraged!
cards.povText: POV: a stranger just made your whole day

cards.title: The Best Part Of A Good Life
cards.caption: Wordsworth on the part of a good life that never makes the headlines: the little, nameless, unremembered acts of kindness. Still true 200 years later. Curated by Threadverse.
cards.quote: That best portion of a man's life, his little, nameless, unremembered acts of kindness and love.

cards.title: Practicing Peace And Kindness Today
cards.caption: A lovely little morning intention, but it's too short and personal to carry as a standalone repost.
cards.povText: POV: your morning intention is just peace and kindness

cards.title: A fragile day, held with joy
cards.caption: "An emotionally fragile day, but lots of joy and kindness in it." Some days that's the whole win. Surfaced quietly by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Been an emotionally fragile day, but lots of joy and kindness in it.

cards.title: Kindness that never left them
cards.caption: A whole NPR thread of people whose kindness left a lasting impression. The good kind of rabbit hole.

cards.title: A little kindness goes a long way
cards.caption: One small act, caught on video, and it lands. What's a tiny kindness a stranger did that you still remember? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: A little kindness goes a long way

cards.title: Be proud of the person you are
cards.caption: "Not because you have everything figured out, but because you continue to show up with kindness, courage and hope." A cat said this. 812 hearts agree.
cards.quote: Be proud of the person you are. Not because you have everything figured out, but because you continue to show up.

cards.title: Lead with kindness, always
cards.caption: Handwritten on her arm: "to the sea." The reminder for today: lead with kindness, always. Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Remember to be kind. Lead with kindness, always.

cards.title: Cloud balls of kindness
cards.caption: "It's a cloud balls of kindness sliding down sun beams kinda morning." I wish you the day you want and need. 130 hearts already do.
cards.quote: It's a cloud balls of kindness sliding down sun beams kinda morning.

cards.title: Empathy isn't the point. Kindness is.
cards.caption: "Empathy can lead to kindness, but it doesn't have to." A quiet reframe that stuck with me. Agree or push back? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: What matters much more than empathy is kindness.

cards.title: Kindness is an addiction. And it's free.
cards.caption: "Once you see the smile on a face after an act of kindness, you tend to want more of that." Best habit you can pick up. Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Kindness is an addiction and it's free.

cards.title: "Being an old soul never goes out of style"
cards.caption: A birthday post that reads like a love letter. "Being an old soul, leading with kindness, and always doing the right thing never goes out of style." Threadverse kept this one. Tag someone who's your old soul.
cards.quote: Being an old soul, leading with kindness, and always doing the right thing never goes out of style.

cards.title: "Melancholy moods change in an instant from simple kindness"
cards.caption: A three-line haiku that lands like a deep breath. "Melancholy moods may change in an instant from simple kindness." One of the quiet ones Threadverse surfaced today.
cards.quote: Melancholy moods may change in an instant from simple kindness.

cards.title: Oh! I like this!
Flowers can feel like miracles.
cards.caption: Wild yellow flowers, an Irish sky, and four words that stop you cold: "Flowers can feel like miracles." Threadverse pulled this out of 5,000 posts. What's your everyday miracle?
cards.quote: Flowers can feel like miracles.
cards.povText: POV: you finally slowed down enough to notice

cards.title: Thanks sweetness
Kindness News and Stories
"Even when the world bared its fangs, you gave it a hug"
cards.caption: Undertale fan art with a line that hits harder than it should: "Even when the world bared its fangs at you, you walked up and gave it a hug. You are filled with KINDNESS." Kept by Threadverse. Who's your hug-the-world person?
cards.quote: Even when the world bared its fangs at you, you walked up and gave it a hug.
cards.povText: POV: the world bared its fangs and you hugged it anyway

cards.title: "Thank you, you humble and honor this old timer"
cards.caption: A creator's first post ever going big, and their reaction is pure gratitude: "Thank you all for the kindness. You humble and honor this old timer." Threadverse surfaced the moment it happened.
cards.quote: Thank you, you humble and honor this old timer.
cards.povText: POV: your post pops off for the first time ever
